prompt: Create a realistic, SFW lifestyle photograph of a woman during her morning routine in a warm luxury hotel-style bathroom. She is standing with her back mostly to the viewer, wearing a plush white bathrobe tied at the waist, drying her long wet dark brown hair with a modern black hair dryer while looking into a large illuminated mirror. Her reflection is visible in the mirror from the front, with a soft sleepy morning expression and one hand lifting a section of wet hair; keep the face natural and unobstructed, not posed glamour-style. The scene includes exactly 6 visible countertop items: 1 folded white towel, 1 round hairbrush with dark bristles, 1 clear pump bottle with pale liquid, 1 small clear cosmetic pump bottle, 1 tall white pump bottle, and 1 chrome sink faucet. Use beige stone walls, a marble vanity countertop, warm vertical mirror lights on both sides, soft ambient lighting, shallow realistic depth of field, and a calm intimate mood. Composition should be vertical portrait orientation, waist-up/back-view foreground figure on the left, mirror reflection centered-right, countertop items along the lower right, natural proportions, photorealistic texture in the wet hair and terry robe, no text, no watermark, no nudity.
